1.给妮子点镜头吧qwq女主感觉高考后就成小透明了，每次都是受害者，光看周哲时间太长效果不好，想看妮子成长。
2.重生之前的那件文物的那条剧情线能否推一下?最开始一直期待着那条线，本以为是主线，结果只在中间穿插一点点。
3.陈嚣怎么才20年呀(希望爽复仇。
最后，求更!!!一天4章根本不给看[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758409167,"group_id":"7338084676994599961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2s8pNs4M9J9+T3c6FzpJox79JuY3xMBduoxsnyCT78s","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36c88500646b462ea1c1297eb6f583f9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708498&x-signature=AzsfrAXjRvGY6y0WoSkuXDy2ccs%3D","user_id":"3943276667480759","user_name":"Lirrum"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3943276667480759","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7338084676994599961","book_info":{"abstract":"如果时间重来一次，你会做什么？
